Bash(grep -A 50 "static override styles = css\\`" packages/core/src/split-panel/flint-split-panel.ts | grep "#" | head -10)

Bash(cat > /tmp/check_exports.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Get all source files \(excluding test and stories\)
declare -a SOURCE_FILES
while IFS= read -r file; do
  # Extract component path without .ts extension
  dir=$\(dirname "$file"\)
  base=$\(basename "$file" .ts\)
  SOURCE_FILES+=\("$dir:$base"\)
done < <\(find /Users/algoassasin/storybook-lit/packages/core/src -maxdepth 2 -type f -name "flint-*.ts" ! -name "*.stories.ts" ! -name "*.test.ts"\)

# Get all stories files
declare -a STORIES_FILES
while IFS= read -r file; do
  dir=$\(dirname "$file"\)
  base=$\(basename "$file" .stories.ts\)
  STORIES_FILES+=\("$dir:$base"\)
done < <\(find /Users/algoassasin/storybook-lit/packages/core/src -maxdepth 2 -type f -name "flint-*.stories.ts"\)

# Check which source files have NO stories
echo "=== SOURCE FILES WITHOUT STORIES ==="
for src in "${SOURCE_FILES[@]}"; do
  found=0
  for story in "${STORIES_FILES[@]}"; do
    if [[ "$src" == "$story" ]]; then
      found=1
      break
    fi
  done
  if [[ $found -eq 0 ]]; then
    echo "$src"
  fi
done

EOF
chmod +x /tmp/check_exports.sh
/tmp/check_exports.sh)
